title: The Choice of Divergence: A Neglected Key to Mitigating Diversity Collapse in Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Reward

methodology.approach: Uses f-divergence computed using generator functions
methodology.requirements: Requires sampling from initial policy, no online reference model needed

findings: RLVR-tuned models improve Pass@1 but often degrade Pass@k performance
Approaches like GRPO and DAPO without KL-divergence still show decline in Pass@k
Temperature coefficient α in entropy regularization is difficult to tune
datasets: Spider (another SQL dataset from different domain)

figure_1.left_panel: Performance of model trained on Bird dataset across different test sets
